params.name: Investiture of Gods
params.description:
On Nov 18, 1571 AD, the book "Investiture of Gods" was completed.
This long novel, born in the Ming Dynasty, is one of the classics in Chinese history. In the form of a romance, it interprets the story of King Wu of Zhou overthrowing the tyrant King Zhou, interweaving with folk myths, reflecting the historical context of that time, and embodying a kind of people-oriented thought that was contrary to feudal ethics but packaged as a "mandate of heaven," which had a profound influence on future …
